analysis.consistency: High. The data fields are consistent with a typical magic item entry. The description clearly outlines the two main mechanical benefits.
analysis.quality: High. The mechanics are clearly defined. The description matches the known properties of the Ring of Spell Turning from D&D 5th Edition.

primary_effect.description: Advantage on saving throws against any spell that targets only the wearer (single-target spells).

secondary_effect.description: If a 20 is rolled on the save against a 7th-level or lower spell targeting only the wearer, the spell has no effect on the wearer and targets the caster instead, using the caster's spellcasting statistics.
